case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. ELVIA ROSA MAY MIS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50 SERVED APR-12-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAY MIS, ELVIA ROSA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO AUG-06-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT ELVIA ROSA MAY MIS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-07-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT ELVIA ROSA MAY MIS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED MORE TIME TO ATTEMPT TO REACH SETTLEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT ELVIA ROSA MAY MIS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE MATTER HAS SETTLED AND IS REQUESTING A DISMISSAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50 SERVED APR-12-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAY MIS, ELVIA ROSA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAY MIS, ELVIA ROSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
